fn_def_list.fn_code:
void
passthrough_device_address_attach(device *me,
				  attach_type attach,
				  int space,
				  unsigned_word addr,
				  unsigned nr_bytes,
				  access_type access,
				  device *client) /*callback/default*/
{
  device_attach_address(device_parent(me), attach,
			space, addr, nr_bytes,
			access,
			client);
}

void
passthrough_device_address_detach(device *me,
				  attach_type attach,
				  int space,
				  unsigned_word addr,
				  unsigned nr_bytes,
				  access_type access,
				  device *client) /*callback/default*/
{
  device_detach_address(device_parent(me), attach,
			space, addr, nr_bytes, access,
			client);
}
